div.head: The Ambassador in Mexico (Daniels) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
137. Amparo on behalf of some of the smaller oil companies on the ground the expropriation decree established monopoly and was
therefore in violation of article 28 of the Constitution has been denied. This request for amparo was in addition to those mentioned in the Embassy’s despatch 6496 of April 15.Not printed.

Congress has now approved the 100 million peso bond issue and steps are being taken now to secure subscriptions. It is said that organizations and industries will be expected to subscribe. Railway Workers Council of Administration has been appointed to operate national railways.
